title: The Phantom Wagon
writer: Selma Lagerlöf, Julien Duvivier, Alexandre Arnoux
actors: Pierre Fresnay, Marie Bell, Micheline Francey
plot: A nun suffering from TB is desperately trying to save an alcoholic tramp and to bring him back to his wife and kids.He has a friend who died last year and became the coachman of the "Ghost Wagon" .
